heading: Certain amounts with respect to nuclear decommissioning costs
label: 88 Certain amounts with respect to nuclear decommissioning costs
text: In the case of any taxpayer who is required to include the amount of any nuclear decommissioning costs in the taxpayer’s cost of service for ratemaking purposes, there shall be includible in the gross income of such taxpayer the amount so included for any taxable year.
notes: Amendments1986— substituted “for ratemaking purposes” for “of ratemaking purposes”.Pub. L. 99–514
